title: 🧪 Tree Traversal Algorithms- Inorder, Preorder and PostOrder
content:
```python
## Tree Traversal Algorithms Implementation: Inorder, Preorder and Postorder
## For every case, the overall time complexity : O(n)
## Practice Task: Do all the traversal algorithms implementation without recursion.
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
        self.data = data


## function definition of inOrder Traversal
def inOrder(root):
    if root:
        ## recursive call for the left subtree
        inOrder(root.left)
        print(str(root.data)+ " ", end=' ')
        ## recursive call for the right subtree
        inOrder(root.right)


## function definition of preOrder Traversal
def preOrder(root):
    if root:
        print(str(root.data)+" ", end=' ')
        ## recursive call for the left subtree
        preOrder(root.left)
        ## recursive call for the right subtree
        preOrder(root.right)
        
## function definition of postOrder Traversal
def postOrder(root):
    if root:
        ## recursive call for the left subtree
        postOrder(root.left)
        ## recursive call for the right subtree
        postOrder(root.right)
        print(str(root.data)+" ", end=' ')

## Driver code
root = Node(1)
root.left = Node(2)
root.right = Node(3)
root.left.left = Node(4)
root.left.right = Node(5)
print("Inorder Traversal")
## function calling
inOrder(root)
print()
print("Preorder Traversal")
preOrder(root)
print()
print("PostOrder Traversal")
postOrder(root)
```
